title: Allow Users to Rearrange Automation Order Freely
excerpt:

posts.author: Jit02 (Hello World)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com team,

Currently, the order of automations cannot be freely rearranged by users. This makes it difficult to keep things organized, especially when managing many similar or conditional automations. Over time, the automation list becomes messy and hard to follow.
It would be extremely helpful if users could manually rearrange the order of automations, for example, by dragging and dropping them to better align with workflows, priorities, or logic flow.

Hope this feature can be considered in future updates. Thank you!

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: 3 posts were merged into an existing topic: Order of automations on a board
